channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Study finds escaping your income bracket no longer builds wealth, fueling consumer pessimism
item.description: Hard work once led to the American Dream, but new research shows parents' wealth now matters more than your paycheck.

item.title: Sanofi builds its own AI ecosystem for competitive edge
item.description: Sanofi is developing custom tools and reimagining AI workflows instead of relying on SaaS vendor products.

item.title: UK spy chief warns window to stay ahead of China and Russia is narrowing
item.description: GCHQ director Anne Keast-Butler said China is a science and tech superpower with advanced intelligence capabilities.

item.title: Interest on national debt consumes record 19% of federal revenue, watchdog warns of worsening trend
item.description: The 30-year Treasury yield reached its highest level since before the Great Recession. A fiscal watchdog warns the timing is particularly concerning.
